title: Tech Disruptors: Nicole Hu on Google TurboQuant and Evolving AI
title_cn: 技术颠覆者：Nicole Hu 谈 Google TurboQuant 和不断发展的人工智能
summary: As hyperscalers look to improve the efficiency of AI workloads, advances in quantization are redefining the tradeoffs between memory and compute, with far-reaching implications for cost, latency, and datacenter architecture. Bloomberg Intelligence Head of Technology Research Mandeep Singh is joined by Nicole Hu, a Silicon Valley technology veteran and GLG expert, to explore the implications of Google’s TurboQuant paper and the evolving economics of AI infrastructure. They examines how new approa

title: ESG Currents: Investing in the $20 Trillion Climate Economy
title_cn: ESG 潮流：投资 20 万亿美元的气候经济
summary: Global costs related to climate events, including damage, insurance premiums, maintenance and repair, have exceeded $20 trillion since the year 2000, according to Bloomberg Intelligence’s Climate Damages Tracker. This massive wealth transfer provides the context for BI’s Climate Economy 2026 Outlook report. On this week’s episode of the ESG Currents podcast, Andy Stevenson, BI senior climate analyst and lead author of the report, joins Eric Kane, BI’s director of ESG research, to discuss how com

title: Yen Holds Near 160 Against Dollar After BOJ’s Ueda Hints at Hike
title_cn: 日本央行上田暗示加息后日元兑美元维持在 160 附近
summary: The yen remained near the 160 level versus the dollar following remarks by Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda that make an interest rate hike this month sound likely but not certain.

title: SambaNova CEO on Making AI More Affordable
title_cn: SambaNova 首席执行官谈如何让人工智能变得更实惠
summary: SambaNova CEO Rodrigo Liang joined Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about why inference is becoming the biggest cost challenge in enterprise AI. And he breaks down the new $3.5 billion AI cloud backed by Vista Equity Partners and Cambium Capital, revealing how a disaggregated architecture combining GPUs, CPUs, and specialized AI processors could dramatically lower costs and accelerate AI agent adoption. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Citizen CEO on How AI Is Rebuilding Banking
title_cn: 公民首席执行官谈人工智能如何重建银行业
summary: Citizens CEO Bruce Van Saun joined Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about how the bank transformed the collapse of First Republic into a booming private banking business worth over $16 billion in deposits. He also explains how AI is reshaping banking operations and why he believes consumers, businesses and private credit remain far more resilient than what many investors expect. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Private Equity's Bet on Tennis
title_cn: 私募股权投资网球
summary: Tennis may be headed for its biggest transformation in years. EQT Managing Partner and CEO Per Franzen and ATP Chairman Andrea Gaudenzi join Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why private equity is betting on tennis, the sport's record-breaking growth, and the push to unite the ATP and WTA under one global commercial vision. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warsh’s Fed Debut a Key Risk for FX Markets, Morgan Stanley Says
title_cn: 摩根士丹利表示，沃什的美联储首次亮相是外汇市场的主要风险
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh’s first policy meeting this month could potentially jolt foreign-exchange markets and upend consensus carry trades, according to Morgan Stanley.

title: Stocks Decline as US-Iran Clashes Drive Oil Higher: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美伊冲突推高油价，股市下跌：市场结束
summary: A renewed advance in oil sent stocks lower as bond yields rose on concern that an escalation of hostilities between the US and Iran will hinder prospects for a peace deal, with elevated energy costs fueling inflation risks.

title: Goldman’s Minnis Sees AI as ‘Generational’ Force Driving Markets
title_cn: 高盛的明尼斯将人工智能视为推动市场的“世代”力量
summary: The boom in artificial intelligence investment is a “fundamental, generational” phenomenon driving markets and filtering through to the economy at large, said Christina Minnis, global head of the alternatives origination group at Goldman Sachs Group Inc.

title: Bill Ackman’s Pershing Square Set to Exit Universal Music Stake
title_cn: 比尔·阿克曼的潘兴广场将退出环球音乐股份
summary: Bill Ackman is looking to sell his stake in Universal Music Group NV just days after the Amsterdam-listed group rejected a takeover bid by the hedge fund billionaire.

title: Bloomberg Money: Where To Invest Now
title_cn: 彭博财经：现在去哪里投资
summary: Bloomberg.com subscribers were invited to celebrate the launch of Bloomberg Money, a new destination with news, insight and intelligence for navigating your financial life. Tom Keene and Scarlet Fu are your hosts. The event took place in New York on June 2.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Applied Aerospace Shares Rise 3.75% After $650 Million US IPO
title_cn: 应用航空航天公司在美国首次公开募股 6.5 亿美元后股价上涨 3.75%
summary: Shares of Applied Aerospace & Defense Inc. rose about 3.75% in its trading debut, after the space and defense engineering firm raised $650 million in an initial public offering priced near the top of a marketed range.

title: Do Investors Have FOMO In These Markets?
title_cn: 投资者在这些市场中是否有 FOMO 情绪？
summary: Steve Sosnick, chief strategist at Interactive Brokers, and Kevin Gordon, head of macro research and strategy at the Schwab Center for Financial Research, discuss the fear of missing out in markets. They speak in New York on June 2 at a Bloomberg subscribers only event for the launch of Bloomberg Money. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: This Is the Moment for Stock Picking, Berry Says
title_cn: 贝瑞表示，现在是选股的时刻
summary: Ann Berry, founder of Threadneedle Ventures, says she's not looking for value in energy anymore. She speaks in New York on June 2 at a Bloomberg subscribers only event for the launch of Bloomberg Money. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Barclays’ Wei Says ‘Prepare for War’ in Software Refinancing
title_cn: 巴克莱银行魏说软件再融资“做好战争准备”
summary: Tremors in the software debt market were still top of mind for industry heavyweights speaking at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York on Wednesday.

title: George Santos’ Kalshi Bets About Himself Spark Insider Trading Investigation
title_cn: 乔治·桑托斯的卡尔希押注自己引发内幕交易调查
summary: George Santos has emerged as the latest flashpoint in the controversy over possible insider trading on prediction markets, as concerns become increasingly widespread about potential illicit bets on the platforms.

title: Big New BP Shareholder Adds to Stock Despite Boardroom Chaos
title_cn: 尽管董事会混乱，英国石油公司新大股东仍增持股票
summary: A large new investor in BP Plc topped up its holding after the shock firing of the oil major’s chairman last week, betting that the boardroom drama won’t derail the company’s strategic approach.

title: S&P 500 Falls as Deadly US-Iran Flareup Puts Strain on Truce
title_cn: 美伊致命冲突给休战带来压力，标普 500 指数下跌
summary: The rally in US stocks stalled on Wednesday as clashes between the US and Iran put further strain on a fragile ceasefire agreement, while also driving oil higher.

title: UK Labour Party Warned Against Tacking Left on Wealth Sharing
title_cn: 英国工党警告不要在财富分享问题上向左倾
summary: UK Business Secretary Peter Kyle warned his Labour colleagues against pursuing redistribution of wealth without first prioritizing economic growth, as the party faces a potential tilt to the left if Keir Starmer is replaced as prime minister.

title: Credit Titans Warn of Shakeout on Deals That ‘Don’t Make Sense’
title_cn: 信贷巨头警告称，“没有意义”的交易可能会遭到淘汰
summary: Beneath the surface of buoyant credit markets, a shakeout is building for leveraged deals made years ago, as well as for direct-lending funds that are grappling with an extended period of investor withdrawals.

title: JPMorgan to Sell $1.85 Billion Debt for Belden’s Ruckus Buyout
title_cn: 摩根大通将为 Belden 收购 Ruckus 出售 18.5 亿美元债务
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is preparing to sell a $1.85 billion debt financing backing Belden’s acquisition of Ruckus Network.

title: Sosnick on Where Investors Should Be Greedy
title_cn: 索斯尼克谈投资者应该贪婪的地方
summary: Steve Sosnick of Interactive Brokers talks about where investors should be greedy right now. He speaks in New York at a Bloomberg subscribers only event for the launch of Bloomberg Money. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SDNY's Clayton Takes Closer Look at Private Credit
title_cn: SDNY 的克莱顿仔细研究私人信贷
summary: Jay Clayton, the US attorney for the Southern District of New York, said his office is looking at possible valuation discrepancies in the private credit marketplace. He speaks at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lila Sciences Said in Talks for Funds at $8.5 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Lila Sciences 在融资谈判中称估值 85 亿美元
summary: Artificial intelligence research startup Lila Sciences Inc. is in talks to raise about $2 billion at an expected valuation of about $8.5 billion before the new money, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Santander Employee Arrested in $85 Million Chile Crime Sting
title_cn: 桑坦德银行员工因价值 8500 万美元的智利犯罪活动被捕
summary: An employee of Banco Santander’s Chile unit was among 19 suspects detained by police Tuesday as authorities moved against the Venezuelan Tren de Aragua criminal organization allegedly operating in the South American country.

title: Vitol Warns Gasoline Could Be Next Fuel to Face Supply Crunch
title_cn: 维多警告汽油可能成为下一个面临供应紧缩的燃料
summary: Gasoline could be the next petroleum product to come under intense supply pressure as the Iran war rumbles on, according to oil trading giant Vitol Group.

title: Gold Slips as Middle East Tensions Keep Inflation Risks Elevated
title_cn: 中东紧张局势导致通胀风险上升，金价下跌
summary: Gold declined as renewed clashes in the Middle East cast doubt over a US-Iran peace deal, keeping energy prices elevated and inflation concerns high.

title: Private Credit Faces ‘Pipeline of Defaults,’ Holly Kim Says
title_cn: 霍莉·金 (Holly Kim) 表示，私人信贷面临“一系列违约”
summary: Glendon Capital co-founder Holly Kim explains why the private credit industry stands to see a big “backlog of defaults” away from any economic dislocations or any other inflation-related economic inputs. She speaks at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Options Traders Look Past Jobs Data as Inflation Takes Spotlight
title_cn: 通胀成为焦点，期权交易者关注过去的就业数据
summary: Wall Street traders expect a strong jobs report on Friday. That may not be enough to soothe them, as the war-fueled oil price shock increasingly shifts the focus toward inflation.

title: Vanguard’s VOO Hits $1 Trillion of Assets in ETF Industry First
title_cn: Vanguard 的 VOO ETF 资产规模首次突破 1 万亿美元
summary: A seemingly endless appetite for buying US stock dips has propelled Vanguard Group’s S&P 500-tracking ETF past $1 trillion in assets, making it the first fund of its kind to reach a milestone once thought unimaginable for the ETF industry.

title: Ares CEO Arougheti Says the Private Credit Market Isn't Broken
title_cn: Ares 首席执行官 Arougheti 表示私人信贷市场并未崩溃
summary: Ares Management co-founder and CEO Michael Arougheti says the private credit market remains strong and the recent stress in the private credit market is tied to private equity. He speaks with Dani Burger at the Forbes Iconoclast Summit in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: T-Mobile Wants to Sell a Lifestyle, Not Just Wireless
title_cn: T-Mobile 希望销售一种生活方式，而不仅仅是无线
summary: Felisha White, a 34-year-old T-Mobile US Inc. customer in New York, stays up late on Monday nights to see what the latest deal drops will be from her wireless provider.

title: SpaceX Said to Target $75 Billion in IPO at $135 Per Share
title_cn: 据称 SpaceX 的 IPO 目标是 750 亿美元，每股 135 美元
summary:
SpaceX is planning to offer shares ​at $135 apiece to raise $75 ​billion in its ⁠initial public ​offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as Elon Musk rejects another Wall Street convention by setting a fixed price ahead of the marketing phase of the deal.

The rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company aims to sell 555.6 million shares in the offering, the people said. Deliberations are ongoing and details of the IPO could still change before the terms are disclosed as soon as Wednesday, or even during the marketing process, they said, asking not to be identified as the information isn’t public. The move adds to the unconventional aspects of a deal that’s set to be the biggest ever listing.

We get reaction from George Ferguson, Senior Aerospace Analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GoldenTree's Tananbaum Says It's a 'Tough Time' to Be in Credit
title_cn: 金树银行的塔南鲍姆表示，现在是信贷的“艰难时期”
summary: GoldenTree Asset Management Founder and CIO Steven Tananbaum says credit market has "languished" but there are pockets of opportunity at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ray Dalio Says AI Bubble to Burst as Wealth Converts to Money
title_cn: 雷·达里奥 (Ray Dalio) 表示，随着财富转化为金钱，人工智能泡沫将破裂
summary: Billionaire investor Ray Dalio says, “all great technology changes produce bubbles” and sees signs in the booming artificial-intelligence market of a bubble that will eventually burst with the converting of wealth into money. He speaks with Bloomberg’s Dani Burger. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Looking for Opportunities in AI
title_cn: 寻找人工智能领域的机会
summary: Kevin Gordon, head of macro research and strategy at the Schwab Center for Financial Research, and Ann Berry, founder of Threadneedle Ventures, talk about how they're investing in artificial intelligence. They speak at a special Bloomberg Money event just for subscribers on June 2 in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Can Nvidia Do to Get Investors Excited Again?
title_cn: 英伟达可以采取什么措施让投资者再次兴奋？
summary: The only thing harder than creating the world’s most valuable company? Staying on top.

title: Goldman's Minnis Sees 'Generational' AI Shift Fueling Markets
title_cn: 高盛的明尼斯认为“世代”人工智能转变将推动市场
summary: Christina Minnis, global head of the alternatives origination group at Goldman Sachs, says lines are blurring between different businesses, noting that businesses such as structured products, investment-grade debt and leveraged finance sit on one floor at Goldman Sachs. She speaks at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dalio Sees AI Bubble Bursting as Wealth Is Converted Into Money
title_cn: Dalio 认为随着财富转化为金钱，人工智能泡沫将破灭
summary: Billionaire investor Ray Dalio said the booming artificial-intelligence market shows signs of a bubble that will eventually burst.

title: Bitcoin’s Break With Tech Widens as Strategy’s Sale Feeds Rout
title_cn: 随着战略的出售导致溃败，比特币与科技的差距扩大
summary:
Bitcoin’s selloff extended into Wednesday after Strategy Inc.’s sale of a tiny portion of its massive cryptocurrency stockpile rattled sentiment and widened the token’s divergence from record-setting technology shares.
Jim Ferraioli, Director of Digital Currencies Research and Strategy at Charles Schwab, discusses Bitcoin's latest moves and Charles Schwab's report on mining economics and digital asset outlook. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Macy's Lifts Sales Outlook; GameStop Collectibles Business | Stock Movers
title_cn: 梅西百货提升销售前景； GameStop 收藏品业务 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with John Tucker:

- Macy's (M) shares are on the move after it lifted its sales outlook for the year, a sign that the company’s focus on growing its luxury business and improving its assortment is paying off. 
- GameStop (GME) shares are climbing after the video-game retailer reported a record quarterly profit driven by its collectibles business. Sales overall climbed 14% to $835.3 million. Net income of $389.6 million was the highest ever for a quarter in the company’s history, GameStop said in a regulatory filing Tuesday.
- Palo Alto (PANW) shares are dropping as the security software company reported results following a 61% year-to-date rally. The company reported third-quarter results that beat the average analyst expectation and raised its full-year forecast for key metrics, but failed to meet elevated buyside expectations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk’s xAI Pauses Hiring for Specialists to Train Grok Chatbot
title_cn: 马斯克的 xAI 暂停招聘专家来训练 Grok 聊天机器人
summary: Elon Musk’s xAI has paused hiring for professionals to train its Grok chatbot on a range of specialized skills, according to people with knowledge of the matter, marking a potential shift in how the artificial intelligence firm develops its technology.

title: Adobe Eyes Two Internal Leaders, AI Outsiders for CEO Role
title_cn: Adobe 有意聘请两名内部领导者和 AI 外部人士担任首席执行官
summary: Adobe Inc. is eyeing two internal leaders in its quest for a new chief executive officer and has hired a well-known search firm to find external candidates who could be suited to running the company in the AI era.

title: Uber Cuts 23% of People Division as New President Takes Over
title_cn: 新总裁上任后 Uber 裁员 23%
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. said it is cutting 23% of jobs in a division that includes human resources, recruitment, workplace facilities and culture, part of a move by the rideshare company’s newly promoted president Jill Hazelbaker to simplify team structure.

title: Brookfield Bets on AI at Scale Never Tested Before in $50 Billion Push
title_cn: Brookfield 斥资 500 亿美元押注人工智能，规模从未测试过
summary: Bloom Energy Corp. struggled for years to convince investors its fuel cells were a practical alternative to cheaper sources of electricity. Then Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. came along right as the AI boom ramped up.

title: Alphabet Upsizes Equity Offering to $85 Billion for AI Spending
title_cn: Alphabet 将股票发行规模扩大至 850 亿美元用于人工智能支出
summary: Google parent Alphabet Inc. upsized its equity raise to $84.75 billion from the $80 billion it announced just two days earlier in a bid to help fund growing artificial intelligence spending plans.

title: AI Funding Boom Reaches Muni Market With Google-Tied Deal
title_cn: 人工智能融资热潮通过与谷歌合作的交易进入市政市场
summary: Google parent Alphabet Inc. is poised to enter the municipal-bond market’s prepaid energy space by participating in a $1 billion transaction out of California, a major development in the evolution of a booming segment.

title: Bloomberg Wealth: Jeff Aronson
title_cn: 彭博财富：杰夫·阿伦森
summary: Centerbridge co-founder Jeff Aronson says private credit is not a systemic risk to the US economy, despite growing concerns about the sector. He also discusses how AI is reshaping investing, while arguing that it won't replace human judgement. Aronson reflects on his journey from lawyer to distressed debt investor and explains how he went on to launch Centerbridge in 2005. Aronson sits down with David Rubenstein for the premiere episode of Bloomberg Wealth Season 6. This interview was recorded April 21 in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Targets $75 Billion in IPO at $135 Per Share
title_cn: SpaceX 目标 IPO 融资 750 亿美元，每股 135 美元
summary: SpaceX is planning to offer shares ​at $135 apiece to raise $75 ​billion in its ⁠initial public ​offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as Elon Musk rejects another Wall Street convention by setting a fixed price ahead of the marketing phase of the deal.

title: Broadcom’s $280 Billion, Four-Day Bonanza to Get Earnings Check
title_cn: Broadcom 2800 亿美元的四天财富将获得收益检查
summary: Broadcom Inc. shares have been on a tear, adding more than $280 billion in market value in just the last four sessions. But with earnings arriving after the bell, investors will have a chance to assess whether the rally has gone too far.

title: Meta Sells AI Agent for Businesses in Push to Monetize Service
title_cn: Meta 出售面向企业的人工智能代理以推动服务货币化
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is selling businesses access to an artificial intelligence agent for the first time, its latest effort to generate revenue to offset the company’s hefty AI investments.

title: Bank of America Bucks AI Job Fears With 2,000 Summer Interns
title_cn: 美国银行通过 2,000 名暑期实习生克服人工智能工作恐惧
summary: Bank of America Corp. is continuing to hire even as artificial intelligence and other technology tools take over jobs and cut off many traditional career paths.

title: SpaceX IPO Is About Buying Elon Musk, Ives Says
title_cn: 艾夫斯表示，SpaceX IPO 是为了收购埃隆·马斯克
summary: Dan Ives of Wedbush Securities talks about the tidal wave of IPOs that are starting to hit the market. He says the upcoming SpaceX IPO is all about buying Elon Musk. Ives speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former VP Mike Pence on Conservatism, AI, Donald Trump
title_cn: 前副总统迈克·彭斯谈保守主义、人工智能、唐纳德·特朗普
summary: Former US Vice President Mike Pence discusses his new book, "What Conservatives Believe,” what he sees as the future for the Republican Party, regulation of artificial intelligence, and his relationship with President Donald Trump. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Unveils Sweeping Tech Sovereignty Plan to Boost Chips, AI
title_cn: 欧洲推出全面技术主权计划以推动芯片和人工智能发展
summary: The European Union unveiled a sweeping plan to expand its domestic technology supply chains, targeting greater independence from the US and Asia in semiconductors, artificial intelligence and cloud computing.

title: 23andMe Is Back as Nonprofit Aiming to Reach 100 Million Users
title_cn: 23andMe 回归非营利组织，目标覆盖 1 亿用户
summary: The founder of 23andMe Research Institute wants to reach 100 million users, an ambitious goal after the seller of DNA testing kits emerged from bankruptcy as a nonprofit.

title: Sitecore Said to Acquire Scrunch for $225 Million
title_cn: Sitecore 将以 2.25 亿美元收购 Scrunch
summary: Sitecore A/S, the digital-experience software company, has acquired Scrunch, a customer-experience platform that helps brands improve how they appear in AI-generated search results, according to a statement reviewed by Bloomberg.

title: US and Iran in Deadly Clashes, Putting Fresh Strain on Truce
title_cn: 美国和伊朗发生致命冲突，给停战带来新的压力
summary:
The US and Iran clashed again overnight, with Kuwait and Bahrain caught in the crossfire of the most serious flare-up since a ceasefire went into effect in early April.

The developments follow days of rising tension, including over Israeli operations against Tehran-backed Hezbollah militants in Lebanon, that threaten to derail US-Iran talks about an interim peace deal. The sides have agreed on a rough framework that should extend their truce by two months and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, though negotiations over the final details are dragging on.

Shortly after hitting an empty oil tanker heading to Iran, the US military said it came under missile and drone attack. Iran targeted the US’s main naval base in the region, located in Bahrain, and the Ali Al-Salem airbase in Kuwait. For more, we speak with Ethan Bronner, Bloomberg News Israel Bureau Chief. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Becerra, Hilton Take Early Lead in California Governor Race
title_cn: 贝塞拉和希尔顿在加州州长竞选中领先
summary: Republican Steve Hilton and Democrat Xavier Becerra surged to the top of California’s crowded gubernatorial primary, with billionaire Tom Steyer trailing in a contest shaped by money, scandal and uncertainty.

title: Senate Republicans Strip Trump Ballroom Funds from Spending Bill
title_cn: 参议院共和党人从支出法案中剥夺特朗普舞厅资金
summary: Senate Republicans stripped federal funds for Donald Trump’s White House ballroom from a spending package after the money triggered a blacklash from lawmakers in both parties.

title: Trump to Attend NATO Leaders’ Summit in Turkey, Rubio Says
title_cn: 卢比奥表示特朗普将出席在土耳其举行的北约领导人峰会
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said President Donald Trump will attend the NATO leaders’ meeting in Ankara in July.

title: US Tells Europe to Add More Aircraft and Vessels as It Pulls Out
title_cn: 美国要求欧洲在撤军时增加更多飞机和船只
summary: The US has singled out aircraft, manned and unmanned, and naval vessels as specific areas where NATO allies could replace US assets as it pulls out.

title: DHS Chief Mullin Says He Canceled Most Contracts Left by Noem
title_cn: 国土安全部负责人穆林表示，他取消了诺姆留下的大部分合同
summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the department has canceled most contracts that had been pending when he took over from former Secretary Kristi Noem, a sign he’s putting his own mark on an agency that has faced months of turmoil.

title: Trump Tweaks Copper Tariff Rules Ahead of Refined Metal Review
title_cn: 特朗普在精炼金属审查之前调整铜关税规则
summary: The Trump administration is modifying rules for tariffs on copper products coming into the US, making it easier for importers to qualify for preferential treatment tied to metal produced domestically.

title: Panama Canal Considers Water Limits to Thwart El Niño Impacts
title_cn: 巴拿马运河考虑限制水量以阻止厄尔尼诺现象
summary: The Panama Canal Authority is stepping up efforts to brace for El Niño-fueled weather extremes by drafting a plan that avoids limiting the type of vessel restrictions that hampered shipping through the waterway three years ago.

title: US Ally Kuwait Suffers Worst Attack Since Iran Ceasefire
title_cn: 美国盟友科威特遭受伊朗停火以来最严重袭击
summary: Kuwait, a staunch US ally that hosts thousands of American troops, has become a key target of Iran since the ceasefire took effect on April 8, suffering half a dozen attacks in the past two months.

title: US Tariff Threats Give Lula New Election Attack on Bolsonaro
title_cn: 美国关税威胁给卢拉带来新的选举攻击博尔索纳罗
summary: Hours after the US proposed 25% tariffs on Brazil, President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva had found a way to seize on the threat.

title: US Forces Help Ships Leave Hormuz With Quiet Project Freedom
title_cn: 美军帮助船只以安静的自由项目离开霍尔木兹
summary: A month after President Donald Trump announced — and then abandoned — a plan to escort commercial ships through the Strait of Hormuz, the US military is trying less public ways of protecting vessels in the vital waterway.

title: Russia’s War Is Getting Too Expensive, Finance Officials Warn Putin
title_cn: 财政官员警告普京，俄罗斯的战争成本太高
summary:
Senior government officials have warned Russian President Vladimir Putin that spending on the war in Ukraine is on an unaffordable path.

It’s the most serious sign of internal division in Moscow since the full-scale invasion began, Anthony Halpin explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rubio Says Trump Was Aware of Iran War Economic Fallout Risks
title_cn: 卢比奥表示特朗普意识到伊朗战争的经济影响风险
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the Trump administration was aware of the potential global economic fallout from launching a war against Iran but assessed the threat of Tehran eventually getting a nuclear weapon to be more serious.

title: US, Iran Exchange Military Strikes to Put Fresh Strains on Ceasefire
title_cn: 美国和伊朗相互军事打击，给停火带来新的压力
summary: The US and Iran clashed again overnight, with Kuwait and Bahrain caught in the crossfire of the most serious flare-up since a ceasefire went into effect in early April.

title: Lithuania Mulls Hosting US Nuclear Weapons Amid Washington Talks
title_cn: 立陶宛考虑在华盛顿会谈中托管美国核武器
summary: Lithuania is considering hosting US nuclear weapons on its territory, defense minister said, as the talks with Washington about boosting deterrence against Russian are ongoing.

title: Pulte Appointment to Intel Chief Puts Spy Powers Law in Jeopardy
title_cn: 普尔特任命为英特尔首席执行官将间谍权力法置于危险之中
summary: Senate Democrats are threatening to block an extension of a controversial spy powers law if the White House refuses to withdraw its appointment of Bill Pulte as the acting director of National Intelligence.

title: States Face Tough Budget Decisions as Medicaid Cuts Mount
title_cn: 随着医疗补助削减的增加，各州面临艰难的预算决定
summary: US states are bracing for the fallout from President Donald Trump’s sweeping Medicaid cuts by weighing tax increases, spending cuts and rollbacks of Medicaid expansion to offset a $900 billion reduction in federal funding over the next decade.

title: EU Allows Room for Energy Crisis Aid, But With a Green Emphasis
title_cn: 欧盟为能源危机援助留出空间，但强调绿色环保
summary: The European Union will give extra budget leeway to member states to cope with high energy prices stoked by the Iran war, so long as it helps curb consumption of fossil fuels.

title: Trump Says He Swore at Netanyahu Over Lebanon Attacks
title_cn: 特朗普称他就黎巴嫩袭击事件向内塔尼亚胡咒骂
summary: Donald Trump said he swore at Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu in a call this week as the US president tried to deescalate fighting in Lebanon and keep peace talks with Iran on track.

title: Chile Senate Takes Up Kast’s Mega Economic Bill as Warnings Grow
title_cn: 随着警告的增加，智利参议院审议了卡斯特的大型经济法案
summary: Chile President José Antonio Kast’s team steamrolled his centerpiece economic bill through the lower house of Congress last month. Now it’s the turn of the Senate, and the dynamic is very different.

title: Turkey to Turn Capital Ankara Into a Fortress for NATO Summit
title_cn: 土耳其将把首都安卡拉变成北约峰会要塞
summary: Turkey is transforming its capital, rocked in recent years by terrorist attacks, into a fortress buttressed by missile defenses and fighter jets ahead of a North Atlantic Treaty Organization summit there next month, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Debt-Laden Boston Suburb Wants to Buy Abandoned College Campus
title_cn: 负债累累的波士顿郊区希望购买废弃的大学校园
summary: Tom Koch, the mayor of Quincy, Massachusetts, is trying to buy the campus that Eastern Nazarene College abandoned when it shuttered last year.

title: Protests Over Kushner’s Resort Test Anger With Albanian Premier
title_cn: 抗议库什纳度假村测试对阿尔巴尼亚总理的愤怒
summary: Protests over a planned €4 billion ($4.6 billion) resort linked to Jared Kushner are testing Albanian Prime Minister Edi Rama’s ability to create more wealth through a tourism boom amid rising public anger over corruption and the use of coastal land.

title: Waller’s Push to Shake Up Fed Stirs Fears Over Regional Autonomy
title_cn: 沃勒推动美联储改组引发对地区自治的担忧
summary: A proposal to streamline Federal Reserve operations has raised alarm inside the sprawling institution over whether it would undermine the autonomy of its 12 regional banks, just as the central bank braces for broader changes from its new chairman, Kevin Warsh.

title: Trump Begins Rebuilding His Tariff Wall, Citing Forced Labor
title_cn: 特朗普以强迫劳动为由开始重建关税墙
summary: The US is proposing new tariffs of at least 10% on imports from 60 trading partners in President Donald Trump’s biggest move to rebuild his protectionist wall since his earlier levies were struck down by the Supreme Court.

title: How Israel’s Battle With Hezbollah Fits Into the Iran War
title_cn: 以色列与真主党的战斗如何融入伊朗战争
summary: When the Lebanese militia Hezbollah entered the US-Israeli war against Iran by firing rockets and drones into Israel the day after the conflict began on Feb. 28, officials there saw in the crisis sweeping the region a chance to finally drive the militia, already weakened by a series of setbacks, away from Israel’s northern border. They’ve been loath to give it up.

title: Absent Republican to Face Ex-Pilot in Key New Jersey House Race
title_cn: 缺席的共和党人将在新泽西州众议院竞选中面对前飞行员
summary: Former US Navy helicopter pilot Rebecca Bennett was projected to win the Democratic primary for a key suburban New Jersey House seat, setting up a November showdown against a Republican congressman whose prolonged absence from public view has reshaped one of the most competitive midterm races.
